action.reasoning: Observation: Current best 0.8191 with 30 TTA views (D4+crops), ensemble best+last. With 28 min remaining and 1 iteration left, retraining impossible. Analysis: More TTA views typically improve accuracy (diminishing returns) without risk. Decision: Increase TTA views from 30 to 50, keep same D4+crop strategy (no rotations), submit eval to push score higher.
